zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Maxwell於1374年出生在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾佩斯利時，她的父親John Maxwell 4th of Pollok37歲，母親Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD36歲。她於大約1400年與Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,在英國蘇格蘭雷福福爾卡夫卡特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Maxwell于1374年出生在英国苏格兰雷福福爾佩斯利时，她的父亲John Maxwell 4th of Pollok37岁，母亲Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD36岁。她于大约1400年与Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,在英国苏格兰雷福福爾卡夫卡特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在苏格兰藍納可爾格拉斯哥享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Maxwell was born in 1374, in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, was 36. She married Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, about 1400, in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1450, in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Maxwell est née en 1374, à Paisley, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, environ 1400, à Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1450, à Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Maxwell 1374 in Paisley, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Maxwell 4th of Pollok 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD 36. Sie hat um 1400 in Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Maxwell è nata il nel 1374 nel Paisley, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, circa 1400, nel Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1450, nel Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Maxwellが1374年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアペイスリーで生まれた時，父John Maxwell 4th of Pollokは37歳，母Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORDは36歳であった。約1400年にイギリススコットランドレンフリューシュアイアカスカートでSir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアグラスゴウで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Maxwell(이)가 1374년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 파이슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Maxwell 4th of Pollok(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 렌프레w실르 캐스카트에서 Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart,(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 글라스고에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Maxwell nasceu em 1374, em Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, aproximadamente 1400, em Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1450, em Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Maxwell родилась в 1374 г. в местности пеисли, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Maxwell 4th of Pollok было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, около 1400 г. в местности каткарт, ренфрюшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1450 г. в местности гласгоу, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Maxwell nació en 1374, en Paisley, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Maxwell 4th of Pollok, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth (Elizabeth De Lindsay Lady Elizabeth Maxwell Countess Pollak) LINDSAY OF CRAWFORD, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir Alan de Cathcart II, First Lord Cathcart, aproximadamente 1400, en Cathcart, Renfrewshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1450, en Glasgow, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 76 años.
